components.name: button
components.description: A versatile button with size and variant support

components.name: badge
components.description: Compact status or metadata label. Soft tint by default; solid for high emphasis.

components.name: spinner
components.description: Indeterminate circular loading indicator. Inherits text color unless tone is set.

components.name: divider
components.description: A thin rule separating content. Horizontal, vertical, or with a centered label.

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with a soft shimmer. Text (multi-line), circle, or rect.

components.name: kbd
components.description: A keyboard key cap for shortcut hints. Single key or a combination.

components.name: avatar
components.description: User image with auto initials fallback and optional status dot. AvatarGroup stacks them.

components.name: input
components.description: Single-line text field with optional leading icon, trailing node, and invalid state.

components.name: textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field. Vertically resizable, with an invalid state.

components.name: icon-button
components.description: A square, label-less button for toolbar/inline icon actions. Always provide aria-label.

components.name: tag
components.description: Removable / selectable pill for filters, tokens, and multi-select chips.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Boolean checkbox with optional label, description, and indeterminate state.

components.name: switch
components.description: Instant on/off toggle for settings that apply immediately (no separate save).

components.name: radio-group
components.description: Single-choice radio group rendered from an options array.

components.name: select
components.description: Styled native dropdown. Pass options or your own option children.

components.name: progress
components.description: Linear progress bar — determinate (value/max) or indeterminate (animated).

components.name: slider
components.description: Drag/keyboard numeric slider. Single value, or a two-thumb min-max band with range.

components.name: stat
components.description: A metric / KPI tile: label, large value, and an optional trend delta. StatGroup lays out a row.

components.name: alert
components.description: Inline callout for status messaging. Four tones with a default icon and optional dismiss.

components.name: banner
components.description: A full-width page/section announcement bar. Subtle or solid, with optional action and dismiss.

components.name: field
components.description: Labelled wrapper for a form control, with hint and error slots.

components.name: card
components.description: Primary surface container with flat/raised/floating elevation. Compose with header, body, footer.

components.name: snippet
components.description: Copyable code — inline command or a multi-line block with title, language, and line numbers.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical location trail. Data-driven items with chevron/slash separators and optional collapse.

components.name: pagination
components.description: Page navigation for tables and lists. Controlled, with sibling collapse and an optional summary.

components.name: segmented-control
components.description: Compact single-select toggle for 2-5 mutually exclusive options, with a sliding thumb.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Horizontal section switcher. Underline or pill style; controlled, render your own panels.

components.name: number-input
components.description: Numeric field with -/+ steppers, min/max clamping, step increments, and arrow-key control.

components.name: toggle
components.description: A single pressable on/off button (text and/or icon). ToggleGroup adds single/multiple select.

components.name: empty-state
components.description: Placeholder for a zero / blank view, with optional icon, copy, and actions.

components.name: stepper
components.description: Progress through an ordered sequence of steps. Horizontal or vertical; done / current / upcoming.

components.name: table
components.description: Data table — sortable columns, hover/selected rows, numeric alignment. Compose head/body/row/cells.

components.name: accordion
components.description: Collapsible sections. Single-open by default or multiple; bordered or separated.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Hover/focus hint that wraps a single trigger element. Four sides, open delay.

components.name: popover
components.description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger. Click to open; closes on outside-click or Esc.

components.name: toast
components.description: Transient notifications. Call toast() from anywhere; mount Toaster once. Tones, actions, auto-dismiss.

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.description: A trigger that opens a floating list of actions. Items, labels, separators, danger tone.

components.name: combobox
components.description: Searchable select. Single or multiple (chips), creatable, and async. Controlled or uncontrolled.

components.name: command-palette
components.description: A Cmd-K launcher: fuzzy search, grouped results, full keyboard nav, scroll-lock overlay.

components.name: dialog
components.description: Centered modal dialog with overlay. Title, description, footer, sizes; closes on overlay/Esc/x.

components.name: drawer
components.description: A panel that slides in from an edge (right/left/bottom). Locks scroll; closes on overlay/Esc/x.

components.name: timeline
components.description: A vertical activity feed: a dot-and-rail list of events with title, time, description, and optional icon.

components.name: rating
components.description: A row of stars for displaying or capturing a score. Half values, hover preview, read-only with value/count label.

components.name: file-upload
components.description: A drag-and-drop dropzone with click-to-browse and a list of selected files showing size, progress, and status.

components.name: date-picker
components.description: A trigger button that opens a Calendar in a popover. Exports a standalone Calendar for inline month grids.

components.name: collapsible
components.description: A single show/hide region with a trigger. Lighter than Accordion; ghost or bordered, animated grid-rows region.

components.name: scroll-area
components.description: A scroll container with a themed thin scrollbar and optional edge fade masks. CSS-first.

components.name: page-header
components.description: A page heading block: breadcrumb, title, description, actions, and optional tabs row.

components.name: sidebar
components.description: A vertical navigation rail with header, scrollable body of groups and items, and footer. Collapsible to icons.

components.name: tree-view
components.description: A nested, expandable tree of nodes with keyboard navigation and selection.

components.name: resizable
components.description: Draggable split panes (horizontal or vertical) with a handle between each panel.

components.name: app-shell
components.description: An application layout shell: fixed sidebar, top header, and scrollable content with a responsive mobile drawer.

components.name: bottom-nav
components.description: Fixed mobile tab bar — the phone counterpart to Sidebar. Safe-area aware, 3–5 destinations, count badges.

components.name: swipe-row
components.description: List row with trailing actions — swipe left on touch, or hover on desktop to reveal.

components.name: toolbar
components.description: Overflow-aware action bar that folds its lowest-priority items into a "More" menu by measuring its own width.

components.name: carousel
components.description: Scroll-snap track with adaptive slides-per-view, native swipe, page dots, and desktop arrows.

components.name: responsive-table
components.description: Data table that renders as a real table on wide containers and stacks into key/value cards when it narrows.

components.name: chart
components.description: Dependency-free responsive SVG chart (area, line, or bar) with hover tooltips, for dashboards and trends.
